presentation.description:
I believe a website should be as fast as it is beautiful. 
My approach focuses on blending technical performance with pixel-perfect UX, always putting the user first.

experience1.description:
Led the end-to-end development of a management platform for gym chains.
I designed the entire architecture starting from technical documentation, UML diagrams, and feasibility analysis, integrating a fast frontend with a robust .NET backend.
achievements: Developed an advanced CRUD system for branch management, room scheduling, and staff assignment.
Implemented an automated membership module for clients to manage plans, locations, and bookings.
Ensured a professional user journey from initial registration to class history generation.

experience2.description: Complete backend development for a scalable e-commerce platform, handling inventory, purchase orders, and payment gateways. Implementation of microservices to decouple business logic.
achievements: I designed and implemented a RESTful API for product and user management.
Successful integration with Stripe for payment processing.
I ensured data consistency through database transactions.

about1.title: Who I am
about1.description:
My relationship with technology began in childhood and evolved into my profession.
I enjoy building digital solutions from scratch, meticulously choosing color palettes and writing clean code to create modern interfaces that don't just solve problems—they captivate users.
Beyond coding, I find inspiration in music, gaming, and continuous learning.

Developed and structured reusable components using Bootstrap

items.title: Technical Internship

TDC 
 Comprehensive audiovisual editing and live content management in high-pressure environments.

project1.description:
Comprehensive platform for gym chain management.
Allows users to manage memberships and bookings, while providing administration with full control over branches, classes, and technical staff.
achievements: Real-time booking system and automated membership management for clients.
Robust administrative dashboard for managing branches, rooms, and teacher assignments.
Scalable architecture connecting a React Vite frontend with a solid .NET backend.

project2.description: Full backend development for a scalable e-commerce platform, handling inventory, purchase orders, and payment gateways. Implementation of microservices to decouple business logic.
achievements: I designed and implemented a RESTful API for product and user management.
Successful integration with Stripe for payment processing.
I ensured data consistency through database transactions.
